title: daemon/store: insert_message_ext is not atomic — unread_count can diverge
description: insert_message_ext (store.rs line 1353) executes two separate queries: INSERT INTO message, then UPDATE chat SET unread_count = unread_count + 1. They are not wrapped in a transaction. If the process is killed or the SQLite connection drops between the two statements, the message row is inserted but the chat's unread_count is not incremented and last_message_at is not updated. The chat will show stale data until a user does something that triggers another unread_count update. Trigger: process crash or DB error between the two queries. Bad behavior: message exists in DB but chat.unread_count does not reflect it; UI shows wrong badge count indefinitely.
